name: push-up
instructions: Start in a high plank. Lower your chest to the floor with elbows at ~45°. Press back up while keeping core tight.

name: bodyweight squat
instructions: Stand feet shoulder-width. Sit hips back and down, keep knees tracking toes. Drive through mid-foot to stand.

name: plank
instructions: Forearms on the floor, elbows under shoulders. Hold a straight line from head to heels without sagging hips.

name: dumbbell row
instructions: Hinge at hips with a flat back. Pull the dumbbell toward your hip, pause, then lower under control.
